hero.headline: Find What Matters,
hero.subheadline: FindoutAI transforms your enterprise documents into instant, structured knowledge — powered by state-of-the-art AI extraction and retrieval.

cta.title: Start Finding Answers Today
cta.description: {{brandName}} gives your team instant access to the knowledge locked inside your documents.

about.title: Enterprise knowledge,
about.story: {{brandName}} was built to solve the universal challenge of enterprise data silos. We believe every team deserves instant, accurate access to their most important documents — securely and intelligently.

footer.tagline: AI-Powered Document Intelligence for the modern enterprise.

intelligence.sectionSubtitle: FindoutAI combines OCR, semantic search, and large language models to give your team superpowers.

philosophy.title: No data silos.
philosophy.description: Traditional enterprise search is slow, inaccurate, and disconnected. FindoutAI breaks down data silos and surfaces the exact answer — from any document, in seconds.

aiInsights.title: Intelligent Document Understanding
aiInsights.description: FindoutAI goes beyond search — it understands relationships, entities, and context across your entire document corpus.

secureWorkspace.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
secureWorkspace.description: SOC 2 aligned architecture with role-based access, PII redaction, and encrypted data pipelines.

roleBasedFlow.title: Role-Based Access
roleBasedFlow.description: Granular permissions ensure every user sees only what they're authorized to access.

productTour.title: See FindoutAI in action
productTour.subtitle: Book a live demo and see how teams unlock knowledge in minutes.
